name: InfiniteHash
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN89 using the official InfiniteHash source repository, repository documentation, and universal TaoMarketCap dashboard. The repository homepage points to infinitehash.xyz, but that deployment currently returns HTTP 402 and is not promoted as a monitored website/API surface.

surfaces.name: InfiniteHash source repository
surfaces.notes: Official InfiniteHash source repository for SN89.

surfaces.name: InfiniteHash auction incentive documentation
surfaces.notes: Public InfiniteHash documentation for the subnet auction incentive mechanism.

surfaces.name: InfiniteHash TaoMarketCap subnet snapshot API
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /public/v1/subnets/89 on api.taomarketcap.com returning machine-readable JSON for SN89 on-chain subnet state, SubnetIdentitiesV3 metadata, economics, and dTAO market fields. InfiniteHash's official infinitehash.xyz deployment currently returns HTTP 402 (Payment required), and no other first-party public API is verified; this indexed feed is documented in the TaoMarketCap developer API.

surfaces.name: InfiniteHash auction incentive mechanism documentation
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth Markdown specification of SN89's action-based auction incentive system and validator responsibilities, published in the official InfiniteHash source repository at docs/subnet_auction_incentive_system.md. Served as a static raw file (distinct from the GitHub blob docs surface) for machine-readable ingestion of the full incentive-mechanism write-up.
